title: Doctor human-readable output shows malformed config issues
description: Black-box smoke for `armature doctor` when the global config file exists but contains invalid JSON.
input: Write an invalid `config.json` under an isolated ARMATURE_HOME, run `armature doctor`, and verify the human-readable output surfaces the config issue block and the affected config kind.
command: bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; TMP_ROOT=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf $TMP_ROOT" EXIT; mkdir -p "$TMP_ROOT/home/.armature"; printf "{bad json\n" > "$TMP_ROOT/home/.armature/config.json"; env -i PATH="$PATH" HOME="$TMP_ROOT/home" ARMATURE_HOME="$TMP_ROOT/home/.armature" ARMATURE_PROVIDER=openai OPENAI_API_KEY=test-openai-key node dist/bin/armature.js doctor'
